# Cubic surfaces from the Elsenhans-Jahnel pipeline (this repo) that do NOT minimize
# within a 120-second MinimizeReduceCubicSurface timeout.  All are S3 (3T2) fields.
# The intrinsic discriminant Delta_Cl is large enough that the reconstructed model is
# badly non-minimal: its model discriminant carries huge unfactorable spurious primes,
# so MinimizeReduceCubicSurface stalls.  ReduceCubicSurface (LLL reduction only) shrinks
# the coefficients by <2% here, so the size below reflects genuine non-minimality.
#
# Per example: the number field (its defining polynomial) and its LMFDB label, the W(E6) class (Galois action
# on the 27 lines), the Clebsch invariants [I8,I16,I24,I32,I40] (which determine the
# surface), Delta_Cl, and an explicit cubic in P^3 (x,y,z,w), ReduceCubicSurface-reduced
# but NOT minimized.


=== Example 1 ===
number field : T^3 + T - 1
LMFDB        : 3.1.31.1  (https://www.lmfdb.org/NumberField/3.1.31.1 , Galois group S3 = 3T2)
W(E6) class  : 51840.b.8640.n2.a1
Clebsch      : [ -47990950859520, 62476665616466542658792448, 383197281233744085950099420126802542592, 2378877394241328789075992343543497501327072827539456, 475191104070994576903814657882210565052032292991200720960094208 ]
Delta_Cl     : 1561493837634757349529399854140599971449291660276531200  (55 digits)
max |coef|   : 485 digits
cubic        : -76077759016470901502375213304402461869596801024526833262757277322139420326140868132350293271847032758317428450909010164014381145221363376732506792834899231672965623915720296010789476731728513947614625023399954239610175482637692918660413009635704712742550467471222572625*x^3 + 362995215480349725364284742016586467696959281248232971908059176865349585845286003240175458959140584632817858569244875559238416741686597966013227651015041484764216590424845339981628453653431300526601347563569853939249940415946076767789216318709929377836903737691954166899160997601896247066118025*x^2*y + *x^2*z - *x^2*w + *x*y^2 - *x*y*z + *x*y*w + *x*z^2 - *x*z*w + *x*w^2 + *y^3 - *y^2*z + *y^2*w - *y*z^2 - *y*z*w - *y*w^2 - *z^3 + *z^2*w + *z*w^2 + *w^3
